form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 5th of 7 at Saratoga on June 8 over 1106m, 12 len behind Angel Gift with 54kg at $30. Likely to make her presence felt.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At long odds at debut, 3rd of 9 at this track on February 5 over 1207m, 11 len behind Tenacious Child with 55.5kg at $27.18. form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Saratoga July 19 over 1106m, 19 len behind Shakti with 54kg at $11.80. On debut second last of 8 at Aqueduct Turf June 29 over 1207m, 14 len behind Nacho Problem carrying 54kg at $7.60. Unlikely to threaten.
